meta.goal: ship stronger anti-repetition procedural music with reliable iteration tests and bootstrap a new style from reference audio

today_scope.phase_1: M2 theme variation engine implemented test-first
today_scope.phase_2: music testing suite upgraded for fast RED/GREEN iteration
today_scope.phase_3: reference-audio style extraction path and first generated style bootstrap

required: add or tighten smoke acceptance checks first
run smoke and capture RED evidence

roadmap.description: explicit motif variation operators, signature cooldown policy, and novelty debt pressure
implementation_notes: add transform classes for exact recall vs transformed recall
track motif signatures and cooldown-window violations
increase mutation pressure when novelty debt rises
expose motif telemetry in probe snapshots/summary
acceptance_checks: exact motif reuse ratio <= configured maximum
novelty debt remains below collapse threshold

roadmap.description: add M2-focused checks to smoke for deterministic RED/GREEN loops
implementation_notes: extend scripts/music_smoke_test.sh parsing for motif metrics
add configurable thresholds via env vars
emit RESULT fields and summary topic counters for M2
acceptance_checks: intentional bad threshold run produces RED
default thresholds pass after M2 implementation
result lines show motif metrics for every style

roadmap.description: prepare seam-aware transition instrumentation for next pass
implementation_notes: reserve smoke checks for boundary continuity
acceptance_checks: bridge-state logs present during cue transitions

roadmap.description: upgrade procedural music evaluation with sequence-level anti-repetition signals
implementation_notes: derive per-snapshot structural tokens from probe output
track repeated 3-gram ratio as a direct repetition proxy
track novelty slope from early vs late quartile token diversity
track cross-seed aligned-token divergence, including late-phase divergence
acceptance_checks: result lines include M5 token metrics for every style
M5 checks fail under intentionally strict thresholds
default thresholds pass on baseline styles

roadmap.description: bootstrap one new procedural style using a reference track's feel/genre
implementation_notes: phase-1 tooling implemented: stem extraction, stem QC, stem instrument profiling
add offline style-profile extractor from reference audio
add new procedural style module seeded by extracted profile
wire style into settings and probe
acceptance_checks: new style appears in music style selection and probe
new style passes smoke baseline + M2 checks
profile file is reproducible from same reference input

risk_controls: feature-flag high-impact behavior until smoke passes
keep each style stable by default and opt into stronger mutation gradually
avoid destructive timbre shifts while improving structure
